query: UPDATE sessions session SET recent_auth_token_digest = $5, recent_auth_purpose = $6, recent_auth_resource_id = $7, recent_auth_expires_at = $8 WHERE session.id = $1 AND session.user_id = $2 AND session.security_version = $3 AND session.expires_at > $4 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE users.id = session.user_id AND users.active AND users.security_version = session.security_version )
